title: taraxacum subaragonicum
intro: Taraxacum subaragonicum, commonly known as the Spanish dandelion or small dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum subaragonicum include its ability to support liver health, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion, among other benefits. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as capsules and salves.
